##!source.syntax=xwiki/2.1
{{velocity}}
{{html clean="false"}}
## Base configuration for all BlockNote editor instances created on this web page.
#set ($config = {
  'collaborationURL': $services.websocket.url('yjs')
})
<script id="blocknote-config" type="application/json">$jsontool.serialize($config).replace('<', '\u003C')</script>
{{/html}}
{{/velocity}}
